name: cloud build: a pillar with no grounding source is marked needs_grounding
command:
printf -- '- id: x\n  pillars: [security]\n' > stub.yaml
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-build.sh" scaffold --decision-id d3 --pillar sustainability --catalog stub.yaml --build-dir b3 --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>&1 | grep -E 'grounding=needs_grounding' 1>&2 && echo needs-grounding 1>&2
